## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between SmithAI and GrowthX teams to discuss website updates, performance metrics, and data tracking strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/8mcb2aGsYyVevg7qzY26sTPpxXgDAccr?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Website refresh progress: 9 industry pages published, 7 remaining; partner page updates in progress](https://fathom.video/share/8mcb2aGsYyVevg7qzY26sTPpxXgDAccr?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)
  - [Looker dashboard implemented for automated performance tracking, replacing previous screenshot reports](https://fathom.video/share/8mcb2aGsYyVevg7qzY26sTPpxXgDAccr?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [Need to refine event tracking and data exclusions (e.g., careers, internal users) for more accurate metrics](https://fathom.video/share/8mcb2aGsYyVevg7qzY26sTPpxXgDAccr?tab=summary&timestamp=1377.0)
  - [Importance of tracking LLM referrals and preventing keyword cannibalization between landing pages and blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/8mcb2aGsYyVevg7qzY26sTPpxXgDAccr?tab=summary&timestamp=1517.0)

## Topics

### Website Refresh Updates

  - [9 additional industry pages published, 7 remaining to complete the set](https://fathom.video/share/8mcb2aGsYyVevg7qzY26sTPpxXgDAccr?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
  - [Partner page updates in progress; Megan working on non-live version for tweaks](https://fathom.video/share/8mcb2aGsYyVevg7qzY26sTPpxXgDAccr?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)
  - [Design direction: Use homepage and Aether product page as references, moving away from intermediate blue design](https://fathom.video/share/8mcb2aGsYyVevg7qzY26sTPpxXgDAccr?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)

### Looker Dashboard Implementation

  - [Automated reporting replacing previous screenshot-based updates](https://fathom.video/share/8mcb2aGsYyVevg7qzY26sTPpxXgDAccr?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [Data sources: Google Analytics and Google Search Console (no SEMrush data)](https://fathom.video/share/8mcb2aGsYyVevg7qzY26sTPpxXgDAccr?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)
  - [Key sections: Overall tab, Non-branded report, Cohorts, LLM traffic, and Landing pages](https://fathom.video/share/8mcb2aGsYyVevg7qzY26sTPpxXgDAccr?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)
  - [Ability to filter by date range, medium, and specific URLs or clusters](https://fathom.video/share/8mcb2aGsYyVevg7qzY26sTPpxXgDAccr?tab=summary&timestamp=662.0)

### Data Exclusion and Refinement

  - [Need to exclude careers-related pages (/careers, /now-hiring) from all reports](https://fathom.video/share/8mcb2aGsYyVevg7qzY26sTPpxXgDAccr?tab=summary&timestamp=706.0)
  - [Importance of focusing on non-branded keywords and queries](https://fathom.video/share/8mcb2aGsYyVevg7qzY26sTPpxXgDAccr?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)
  - [Discussion on excluding chat-related keywords and other irrelevant terms](https://fathom.video/share/8mcb2aGsYyVevg7qzY26sTPpxXgDAccr?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)

### Event Tracking and Conversion Focus

  - [Plans to incorporate key GA events into the dashboard](https://fathom.video/share/8mcb2aGsYyVevg7qzY26sTPpxXgDAccr?tab=summary&timestamp=1240.0)
  - [Primary focus on page engagement time and CTA clicks](https://fathom.video/share/8mcb2aGsYyVevg7qzY26sTPpxXgDAccr?tab=summary&timestamp=1203.0)
  - [Potential integration with Rudderstack and Amplitude data for more granular tracking](https://fathom.video/share/8mcb2aGsYyVevg7qzY26sTPpxXgDAccr?tab=summary&timestamp=1289.0)
  - [Challenge: Reliably excluding internal users (agents, staff) from engagement metrics](https://fathom.video/share/8mcb2aGsYyVevg7qzY26sTPpxXgDAccr?tab=summary&timestamp=1377.0)

### LLM Referral Tracking

  - [New report showing which LLMs drive traffic to the website](https://fathom.video/share/8mcb2aGsYyVevg7qzY26sTPpxXgDAccr?tab=summary&timestamp=1510.0)
  - [ChatGPT expected to be the primary source due to market share](https://fathom.video/share/8mcb2aGsYyVevg7qzY26sTPpxXgDAccr?tab=summary&timestamp=1517.0)
  - [Useful for validating hypotheses about topic visibility in AI-driven search](https://fathom.video/share/8mcb2aGsYyVevg7qzY26sTPpxXgDAccr?tab=summary&timestamp=1517.0)

### SEO Strategy and Keyword Tracking

  - [Need for more detailed keyword performance tracking, similar to Ahrefs functionality](https://fathom.video/share/8mcb2aGsYyVevg7qzY26sTPpxXgDAccr?tab=summary&timestamp=1579.0)
  - [Focus on preventing keyword cannibalization between landing pages and blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/8mcb2aGsYyVevg7qzY26sTPpxXgDAccr?tab=summary&timestamp=1612.0)
  - [Plans to identify and monitor top commercial keywords, ensuring landing pages rank for these terms](https://fathom.video/share/8mcb2aGsYyVevg7qzY26sTPpxXgDAccr?tab=summary&timestamp=1592.0)

### Scrunch Account Management

  - [Clarification needed on which Scrunch account to use (Smith's own account vs. GrowthX-created account)](https://fathom.video/share/8mcb2aGsYyVevg7qzY26sTPpxXgDAccr?tab=summary&timestamp=1835.0)
  - [Plans to review and potentially update prompts in the Scrunch account](https://fathom.video/share/8mcb2aGsYyVevg7qzY26sTPpxXgDAccr?tab=summary&timestamp=1846.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Maddy to provide a list of most important events to track after aligning with Julian](https://fathom.video/share/8mcb2aGsYyVevg7qzY26sTPpxXgDAccr?tab=summary&timestamp=1240.0)
  - [Investigate potential integration of Rudderstack/Amplitude data into Looker Studio](https://fathom.video/share/8mcb2aGsYyVevg7qzY26sTPpxXgDAccr?tab=summary&timestamp=1289.0)
  - [Jo to update Looker dashboard to exclude careers-related pages and irrelevant keywords](https://fathom.video/share/8mcb2aGsYyVevg7qzY26sTPpxXgDAccr?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)
  - [Team to identify and track top commercial keywords, monitoring for cannibalization issues](https://fathom.video/share/8mcb2aGsYyVevg7qzY26sTPpxXgDAccr?tab=summary&timestamp=1592.0)
  - [Jo to verify correct Scrunch account access and review existing prompts](https://fathom.video/share/8mcb2aGsYyVevg7qzY26sTPpxXgDAccr?tab=summary&timestamp=1846.0)
  - [Follow up on LLMs file review and discuss prompt creation strategy in the next meeting](https://fathom.video/share/8mcb2aGsYyVevg7qzY26sTPpxXgDAccr?tab=summary&timestamp=1789.0)
